description: Start of screen recording
frame_description: This screenshot displays a minimalist interface with a dark gray background, likely part of a video conferencing setup. The layout is centered and sparse, featuring a single line of white instructional text in the middle that reads, "Great. To start, please click the 'Share' button in the Meet call controls and choose to share this window." Key UI elements include a small video thumbnail of a person in the top right corner and a tiny circular help icon (a question mark) in the bottom left corner.

description: 'Open' button becomes visible

description: Navigate to 'Google'

description: Google page loads
frame_description: The screenshot shows the Google Search homepage. Centered on the page is the Google logo above a search bar containing a cursor, a microphone icon, a camera icon, and an 'AI Mode' button. Below the search bar are 'Google Search' and 'I'm Feeling Lucky' buttons, and a promotional text about AI skills. The header includes links for 'About', 'Store', 'Gmail', and 'Images', along with a grid menu and profile icon. The footer displays 'Australia' and links for 'Advertising', 'Business', 'How Search works', 'Privacy', 'Terms', and 'Settings'.
